name: Xavier University
description_short: Xavier University is a Jesuit Catholic institution in Cincinnati, Ohio offering 80+ undergraduate programs and graduate degrees across multiple colleges with a 98% student success rate.
description_long: Xavier University is a private Jesuit Catholic university located in Cincinnati, Ohio, founded on the principles of Catholic education and community service. The institution operates multiple academic colleges including the College of Arts and Sciences, Williams College of Business, College of Professional Sciences, and College of Nursing, serving both undergraduate and graduate students with a strong emphasis on faith-based education and individual student attention. The university offers over 80 undergraduate majors and numerous graduate programs designed to prepare students for careers in fields ranging from data analysis and nursing to business and education. Xavier provides comprehensive academic support, maintains an 11:1 student-faculty ratio, and emphasizes undergraduate research opportunities and experiential learning. The institution also operates 160+ clubs and organizations and competes in Big Time Athletics, creating an engaged campus community. Xavier distinguishes itself through its Jesuit Catholic identity, which shapes its educational philosophy and mission. The university has earned significant recognition from major ranking organizations including U.S. News & World Report, Princeton Review, Forbes, and Niche. Notable rankings include being ranked #2 Most Innovative School in Ohio, #4 Best Value School in Ohio, #6 National University in Ohio, and achieving Gold status as a Military Friendly School. However, Xavier University is an educational institution, not a financial services provider. It does not offer payday loans, personal loans, emergency cash advances, or any of the alternative lending products that would appropriately fall under consumer finance categories. The presence of "Financial Aid" and "Tuition and Fees" on their website refers to student loan financing and educational funding, which are distinct from the consumer lending services that CreditDoc tracks.
services: Graduate degree programs through multiple colleges
Student financial aid and tuition financing
Jesuit Catholic education and faith-based community
Campus housing and student life programming
pros: 98% student success rate for Class of 2023 graduates
Low 11:1 student-to-faculty ratio enables personalized education
80+ undergraduate programs providing diverse career pathway options
Ranked #2 Most Innovative School in Ohio by U.S. News & World Report 2026
Military Friendly School Gold designation recognizing support for veteran students
Top-ranked graduate programs including #1 Online MBA in Management in Ohio
Strong career outcomes with graduates pursuing roles as data analysts, nurses, teachers, and web developers
cons: Xavier University is an educational institution, not a consumer lending provider — it does not offer payday loans, personal loans, or alternative financial products
The payday-alternatives category is fundamentally inappropriate for a university, which serves students seeking education rather than emergency credit
No financial services, lending rates, APR structures, or loan products are offered by this organization
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: Xavier University should NOT be categorized as a financial services provider or listed in CreditDoc's payday-alternatives category. This is an accredited educational institution offering undergraduate and graduate degrees, not a lender or credit provider. The correct category should be removed entirely, as Xavier University operates in higher education, not consumer finance.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
